title: Tabbed interface component with keyboard navigation and multiple variants
purpose: Provides a reusable tab component that supports different visual styles, keyboard navigation, and accessibility features for switching between content sections.
module_context: Exports a Tabs component that accepts tab configuration, active tab state, and change handlers. Includes TypeScript interfaces for tab content and component props.

steps.content: Initialize the active tab state with the provided active tab or first tab.
Define a handler for tab changes that updates state and calls the provided change callback.
Define a keyboard handler for arrow key navigation that moves between tabs.
Render the tab navigation bar with appropriate styling based on the selected variant.
Render the content panel for the currently active tab.
Check if the target tab is not disabled.
Update the active tab state to the target tab.
Call the provided tab change handler with the target tab ID.
Determine the index of the current tab in the tabs array.
Calculate the next tab index based on arrow key input.
Prevent default behavior for arrow key events.
If the next tab is not disabled, trigger a tab change to that tab.
